response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly with TypeScript, Node.js, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. While his AI/GenAI experience is not explicitly detailed as 8+ years, his recent work at re:cinq and contributions to open-source projects suggest relevant expertise. His leadership in technical workshops and mentoring aligns with the role's requirements, though his cloud infrastructure experience could be more explicitly highlighted.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and modern AI-agent frameworks (e.g., MCP).
Proven leadership in technical discovery and mentoring through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
Strong background in building scalable systems and tooling, with a focus on testability and user experience.
concerns: AI/GenAI experience is not explicitly quantified as 8+ years in production-grade solutions.
Cloud platform expertise (AWS/GCP/Azure) is mentioned but not deeply detailed in the resume.
Lacks explicit mention of vector databases or RAG architectures, though related skills may exist.
